## Category
**Cluster:** Anti-Ransomware

---

## Product Brief
1. Halcyon is the industry's first dedicated, adaptive security platform focused specifically on stopping ransomware attacks.
2. It leverages AI-powered detection, multiple layers of protection, and automated recovery to disrupt threats at every stage of the attack lifecycle.
3. Halcyon eliminates the need for ransom payments, ensures operational continuity, and protects businesses from data extortion with a robust ransomware warranty.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Halcyon is conducting daily live, technical demonstrations of its industry-leading anti-ransomware solution at Booth #4315.
- Cynthia Kaiser, SVP of Halcyon's Ransomware Research Center, will present 'How AI Is (And Is Not) Changing Ransomware' on Wednesday, March 25 at 2:40 PM PT at Moscone South, Booth 1400.
- Halcyon experts will be available at Booth #4315 to share the latest findings from the 2026 Security Leadership Report on The Ransomware Gap in the AI Era.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] What are the key differentiators of Halcyon's AI-powered detection compared to other anti-ransomware solutions?
- [ ] How does Halcyon's ransomware warranty work in practice, and what are its coverage details?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on the latest findings from the 2026 Security Leadership Report regarding the ransomware gap in the AI era?
